summary: Boot time exceeds 45 second requirement
description: System boot from power on to home screen takes 58-65 seconds. Requirement is max 45 seconds.
root_cause: Boot sequence not optimized - sequential service startup should be parallelized

summary: Multiple phones connected causes instability
description: When 2+ phones are connected simultaneously Bluetooth becomes unstable and devices randomly disconnect.
root_cause: Bluetooth stack not handling multi-point connection state machine correctly

summary: System becomes unresponsive after STR cycle
description: After suspend-to-RAM (sleep mode) and wake-up system UI is frozen and unresponsive to touch input.
root_cause: Race condition in power manager - UI thread blocked waiting for deadlocked resource

summary: Yellow screen of death and continuous reboot
description: System displays yellow error screen and enters continuous reboot loop. Cannot recover without reflash.
root_cause: Critical service crash during initialization causing boot loop - likely core manager fault

summary: Memory corruption in IPC message passing
description: Random crashes with memory corruption during heavy IPC.
root_cause: Buffer overflow in IPC message serialization.

summary: Black screen during boot for 30 seconds
description: After power on screen remains black for ~30 seconds before splash screen appears. Appears system is frozen.
root_cause: Display initialization delayed - waiting for boot animation service that starts too late

summary: Boot partition mounting fails intermittently
description: Random boot failures with cannot mount boot partition error. Occurs approximately 1 in 20 boots.
root_cause: Filesystem check on boot partition occasionally times out - disk I/O performance issue

summary: Bluetooth audio metadata not updating
description: Song title and artist information doesn't update during Bluetooth music playback.
root_cause: AVRCP metadata event notifications not being processed by media controller

summary: Subwoofer output not working
description: Subwoofer produces no output in any audio mode. All other speakers functioning normally.
root_cause: Subwoofer channel not mapped in audio routing configuration

summary: Stack overflow in camera preview
description: Backup camera preview causes system crash with stack overflow error in logs.
root_cause: Recursive function in image processing pipeline lacks base case termination

summary: System won't boot in extreme cold temperature
description: In temperatures below -20°C system fails to boot. Screen remains black.
root_cause: Boot storage device (eMMC) not responding at extreme low temperature - timing issue

summary: Kernel panic during heavy multitasking
description: Running navigation media player and phone simultaneously causes kernel panic and reboot.
root_cause: Kernel memory exhaustion - not enough reserved memory for critical operations

summary: Boot recovery mode not working
description: Attempting to boot into recovery mode fails. System always boots into normal mode.
root_cause: Boot mode selection switch not read correctly - GPIO pin configuration error

summary: Audio delay when switching between apps
description: Noticeable 2-3 second delay in audio when switching between navigation and media player applications.
root_cause: Audio focus management slow handoff between applications

summary: Bootloader version mismatch error
description: Boot fails with bootloader version mismatch error after software update.
root_cause: Software update didn't update bootloader version compatibility check table

summary: Audio fade in/out not smooth
description: Volume fade when receiving navigation prompts is abrupt and jarring not smooth.
root_cause: Audio fading using stepped volume changes instead of gradual ramping

summary: Cannot pair new Bluetooth devices
description: System fails to enter pairing mode when attempting to add new Bluetooth device. Pairing button has no effect.
root_cause: Bluetooth pairing service not responding - possibly crashed in background

summary: Audio mix causes distortion at maximum volume
description: When multiple audio sources overlap (navigation + media) distortion occurs at high volume levels.
root_cause: Audio mixer not applying proper gain scaling for multi-source mixing

summary: Bluetooth connection latency very high
description: Touch play on phone takes 5+ seconds before audio starts on vehicle speakers.
root_cause: Bluetooth connection interval set too long - should be shorter for lower latency

summary: Persistent audio artifacts after loud noise
description: After loud noise event (door slam horn) audio has clicking artifacts that persist for minutes.
root_cause: Audio AGC (Automatic Gain Control) not recovering to normal state after saturation

summary: Application crash when switching profiles
description: Switching between user profiles causes application crash and return to home screen.
root_cause: Use-after-free bug in profile manager - accessing deallocated user preference object

summary: Audio source switch takes more than 500ms
description: Switching between any audio sources (USB/BT/FM/AUX) takes 500-800ms exceeding 200ms KPI requirement.
root_cause: Large audio buffer (2048 samples) needs flush - should be 512 samples

summary: Memory not released after app termination
description: Application memory not reclaimed after force quit until reboot.
root_cause: Application keeps shared memory segments attached.

summary: Microphone echo during Bluetooth calls
description: Caller reports hearing their own voice echo during hands-free calls via Bluetooth.
root_cause: Echo cancellation algorithm not tuned properly for vehicle acoustic environment

summary: System hang due to priority inversion
description: Low priority thread holding lock blocks high priority thread.
root_cause: Priority inheritance not implemented for mutexes.

summary: Bluetooth music playback control not working
description: Play/pause/skip controls on steering wheel don't work for Bluetooth music. Controls work for USB.
root_cause: AVRCP profile commands not being forwarded to connected phone

summary: Emergency mode boot due to fsck failure
description: System boots into emergency mode reporting filesystem check failed. Requires manual intervention.
root_cause: Filesystem errors detected during boot fsck - likely caused by previous improper shutdown

summary: Boot configuration data corruption
description: System fails to boot with boot configuration data corrupted error. Requires factory reset.
root_cause: BCD store not properly maintained - corruption during previous shutdown

summary: Bluetooth pairing requires multiple attempts
description: Device pairing succeeds only after 3-4 attempts. First few attempts always fail with authentication error.
root_cause: Bluetooth PIN code exchange timing window too short - phones not responding fast enough

summary: Audio playback stuttering during USB source
description: User reports intermittent audio stuttering when playing music from USB drive. Occurs especially during track changes. Audio buffer underrun detected in logs.
root_cause: Audio buffer management issue - insufficient buffering during track transitions causing underruns

summary: Audio format not supported error for MP3 files
description: Some MP3 files show format not supported error despite being valid MP3 format.
root_cause: Audio codec doesn't support variable bit rate MP3 encoding

summary: Bluetooth auto-reconnect not working
description: After phone goes out of range and returns system doesn't automatically reconnect. Manual reconnect needed.
root_cause: Auto-reconnect feature disabled in Bluetooth configuration - profile settings incorrect

summary: Cannot answer call via Bluetooth controls
description: Incoming call notification appears but pressing answer button on steering wheel doesn't answer.
root_cause: HFP call control event handler not registered - callback function never invoked

summary: Home screen crashes when many widgets active
description: Home screen application crashes when user has more than 8 widgets configured on dashboard.
root_cause: Insufficient heap allocation for widget container - fixed size array overflow

summary: Splash screen freezes during animation
description: Boot splash screen animation starts but freezes after 2-3 seconds while boot continues.
root_cause: Graphics rendering issue in boot animation - frame buffer not refreshing

summary: Memory fragmentation after extended operation
description: After 48+ hours allocation failures occur despite available memory.
root_cause: Mixed allocation patterns without compaction causing fragmentation.

summary: Shared memory leak in IPC communication
description: Inter-process communication leaving shared memory segments allocated after processes exit.
root_cause: Shared memory segments not being explicitly destroyed when IPC connection closes

summary: System freeze when opening media player
description: Complete system freeze occurs when launching media player application. Screen becomes unresponsive. Requires hard reboot.
root_cause: Memory corruption in MediaPlayer initialization due to double-free of audio decoder buffer

summary: Dual boot partition sync failure
description: System has dual boot partitions for redundancy but sync between partitions failing.
root_cause: Boot partition replication service not running or insufficient storage space

summary: Out of memory error during boot
description: System fails to complete boot sequence showing out of memory error. Occurs on cold boot.
root_cause: Boot services allocating too much heap memory before releasing unused buffers

summary: Cannot remove paired device from list
description: Attempting to unpair/forget a Bluetooth device fails. Device remains in paired list after deletion.
root_cause: Bluetooth device database not persisting deletion - write to storage failing

summary: Slow boot after software update
description: First boot after OTA update takes 3+ minutes much slower than normal 45 second boot.
root_cause: Update post-installation scripts running during boot - should run in background

summary: Boot filesystem mounted read-only
description: System boots but root filesystem is mounted read-only. Cannot save any settings.
root_cause: Filesystem check detected errors and remounted partition read-only as safety measure

summary: Heap corruption detected in diagnostics
description: Diagnostic mode reports heap corruption errors. System behavior becomes unpredictable.
root_cause: Buffer overflow in telemetry data collection writing beyond allocated memory

summary: Repeated boot loops on cold start
description: On cold boot (temperature below 0°C) system enters boot loop. Warm starts work fine.
root_cause: Temperature-dependent hardware initialization failure causing watchdog reset

summary: Buffer overflow in log message formatting
description: System crashes when log messages exceed buffer size.
root_cause: Fixed size buffer without bounds checking.

summary: FM Radio audio has constant background noise
description: FM Radio source has noticeable background static/hissing noise even with strong signal strength.
root_cause: RF noise not properly filtered in tuner amplifier circuit

summary: Segmentation fault during software update
description: Software OTA update process crashes with segmentation fault leaving system in inconsistent state.
root_cause: Update manager dereferencing null pointer when parsing malformed manifest file

summary: Boot fails with secure boot violation
description: System refuses to boot displaying secure boot verification failure error.
root_cause: Boot image signature invalid - image not signed with correct production key

summary: System logs filling up storage space
description: System partition fills up with log files causing system instability and eventual failure.
root_cause: Log rotation not configured - log files grow unbounded consuming all available space

summary: System slowdown due to excessive logging
description: Performance degrades when debug logging enabled. Disk I/O bottleneck.
root_cause: Synchronous disk writes for every log message.

summary: Watchdog timeout triggering reboot
description: System watchdog timer expires causing forced reboot. Main thread appears hung.
root_cause: Main event loop blocked by synchronous network call exceeding watchdog threshold

summary: Boot services timing out on slow storage
description: On vehicles with older/slower storage media boot services timeout causing failures.
root_cause: Boot service timeout values too aggressive for minimum spec storage performance

summary: Memory leak in event listener registration
description: Event listeners registered but never unregistered causing leak.
root_cause: Missing unregister calls when components destroyed.

summary: Phone shows connected but audio plays on phone
description: Phone indicates connected via Bluetooth but audio continues playing on phone speaker not vehicle.
root_cause: Audio output routing not switched to Bluetooth sink after connection established

summary: Left speaker not working in surround mode
description: In surround sound mode the front left speaker produces no output. Works fine in stereo mode.
root_cause: Audio mixer channel routing error for 5.1 surround configuration

summary: System initialization timeout error
description: Boot process times out with system initialization timeout error. Logs show service startup delays.
root_cause: Multiple services taking too long to initialize - cumulative timeout exceeded

summary: Boot takes 90+ seconds on first startup
description: Initial factory boot after programming takes over 90 seconds. Subsequent boots are normal.
root_cause: First boot performing initial setup tasks - filesystem initialization and key generation

summary: Bluetooth disconnects when starting engine
description: Bluetooth phone connection drops every time engine is started then reconnects after few seconds.
root_cause: Engine electrical noise interfering with Bluetooth RF causing temporary connection loss

summary: Bluetooth call audio only works in one speaker
description: During hands-free calls audio only comes from driver side speaker instead of both.
root_cause: HFP audio routing configured for mono instead of stereo output

summary: Bluetooth phone disconnects after 10 minutes
description: Paired phone disconnects from Bluetooth after approximately 10 minutes of connection. Auto-reconnect fails.
root_cause: Bluetooth keep-alive timer incorrectly configured causing connection timeout

summary: Gradual system slowdown after 2 hours operation
description: System becomes progressively slower over time. UI animations lag touch response degrades. Symptoms appear after 2+ hours of use.
root_cause: Memory leak in graphics rendering pipeline - texture buffers not released after scene changes

summary: Memory leak in animation framework
description: UI animations accumulating in memory during heavy interaction.
root_cause: Animation objects created but never destroyed.

summary: System hang during shutdown sequence
description: System hangs during shutdown sequence. Screen goes black but system doesn't power off. Requires battery disconnect.
root_cause: Shutdown service waiting indefinitely on blocked IPC call to unresponsive process

summary: Memory usage spikes during screen transitions
description: Navigation to settings menu transition causes 200MB memory spike. Memory not released.
root_cause: Screen transition animation caching entire previous and next screen in memory unnecessarily

summary: Equalizer settings reset to default randomly
description: Custom equalizer settings are lost and reset to default at random times during normal operation.
root_cause: EQ settings stored in volatile memory instead of persistent storage

summary: Bluetooth device name not displaying correctly
description: Paired device shows as Unknown Device instead of actual phone name in device list.
root_cause: Device name query (SDP) timing out before response received from phone

summary: Boot interrupted by power management event
description: Boot sequence interrupted mid-process by unexpected sleep event causing incomplete initialization.
root_cause: Power management policy incorrectly triggering sleep during boot phase

summary: Graphics memory not released after video playback
description: After watching videos GPU memory usage remains high and doesn't return to baseline.
root_cause: Video decoder buffers not freed properly after playback completion

summary: Memory leak in sensor data processing
description: Sensor data buffers accumulating in memory. Memory usage increases 50MB per hour.
root_cause: Sensor data processor not freeing buffers after processing complete.

summary: Bass boost causes audio clipping at high volume
description: When bass boost is enabled audio clips and distorts at volume levels above 70%.
root_cause: Audio DSP filter gain too high causing output signal saturation

summary: Popping sound when audio starts/stops
description: Audible pop or click sound from speakers when audio playback starts or stops.
root_cause: Audio amplifier not properly muted during stream attach/detach transitions

summary: Bluetooth SSP pairing always fails
description: Simple Secure Pairing (SSP) always fails falling back to legacy PIN pairing.
root_cause: SSP implementation incomplete - numeric comparison callback not implemented

summary: Volume level not persisted after reboot
description: User sets volume to specific level but after system reboot volume resets to default level. Volume persistence not working.
root_cause: Audio settings not written to NVRAM storage before shutdown

summary: Random reboots during navigation
description: System randomly reboots while using navigation application. No specific pattern identified. Occurs 2-3 times per day.
root_cause: Kernel panic due to stack overflow in navigation route calculation thread

summary: Phone contacts not syncing via Bluetooth
description: After Bluetooth connection phone contacts are not downloaded to vehicle system. PBAP sync fails.
root_cause: PBAP profile initialization failing due to authentication handshake error

summary: CAN bus initialization failure during boot
description: CAN communication fails to initialize during boot. Vehicle functions unavailable.
root_cause: CAN driver failing to initialize - incorrect baud rate or termination resistance

summary: Surround sound imaging incorrect
description: 5.1 surround sound positioning inaccurate. Sounds appear from wrong direction.
root_cause: Speaker positions not calibrated correctly in DSP configuration file

summary: Audio cuts out during navigation announcements
description: Music playback stops during navigation voice guidance but doesn't resume after announcement completes.
root_cause: Audio ducking implementation doesn't restore previous audio stream state

summary: Speed-dependent volume control not working
description: Automatic volume adjustment based on vehicle speed not functioning. Volume remains constant.
root_cause: Speed signal from CAN bus not being read by audio volume controller

summary: System crash during high memory pressure
description: Under memory pressure system crashes instead of killing low priority apps.
root_cause: OOM killer policy not configured properly.

summary: Thread leak in event processing system
description: Event threads created but never destroyed. Thread count grows over time.
root_cause: Thread pool not reaping completed worker threads.

summary: Bluetooth pairing fails with iPhone devices
description: Android phones pair successfully but iPhone pairing always fails with authentication error.
root_cause: iOS requires specific Bluetooth security level not enabled in vehicle stack configuration

summary: Bluetooth connection lost after software update
description: After OTA software update Bluetooth fails to connect to previously paired devices. All devices affected.
root_cause: Bluetooth database corrupted during update - missing migration script for new schema

summary: Stack overflow in recursive UI rendering
description: Deep UI nesting causes stack overflow. Crash when tree > 50 deep.
root_cause: Recursive rendering without depth limit check.

summary: Intermittent Bluetooth connectivity drops
description: Bluetooth connection randomly drops and reconnects every 30-60 minutes of use.
root_cause: Bluetooth firmware bug causing periodic reset of radio module

summary: Post-boot initialization scripts not running
description: Scripts configured to run after boot completion are not executing.
root_cause: systemd unit dependencies incorrect - scripts not triggered by boot-complete target

summary: Boot process hangs at specific percentage
description: Boot progress bar stops at 67% and system hangs indefinitely. No further progress or timeout.
root_cause: Specific service initialization blocking - likely waiting on network or hardware timeout

summary: Excessive memory consumption in cache layer
description: Cache grows unbounded consuming all memory. No size limit.
root_cause: Cache size limit not set. LRU eviction missing.

summary: Init process spawning too many threads
description: Boot system monitor shows init process spawning excessive threads causing boot slowdown.
root_cause: Init script configuration error - services being restarted repeatedly due to crash loop

summary: Race condition causing data corruption
description: User preferences corrupted when multiple processes update simultaneously.
root_cause: Missing synchronization on shared preference file writes.

summary: Bluetooth hands-free and media not working simultaneously
description: Either HFP or A2DP works but not both at same time. Switching between them fails.
root_cause: Bluetooth profile switching logic incorrect - profiles not coexisting properly

summary: Hands-free call audio cutting in and out
description: During Bluetooth hands-free calls audio cuts in and out making conversation difficult.
root_cause: HFP audio buffer underrun - microphone sample rate mismatch with Bluetooth frame rate

summary: Boot logo not displaying correctly
description: Boot splash screen shows corrupted image or wrong logo. Sometimes displays debug text instead.
root_cause: Boot animation file missing or corrupted - fallback to debug mode enabled

summary: Bluetooth reconnection fails after phone reboot
description: After phone reboots vehicle doesn't reconnect to it automatically even though paired.
root_cause: Bluetooth device cache not handling device address rotation after phone restart

summary: Phone battery drains faster when connected
description: Users report faster phone battery drain when connected to vehicle Bluetooth.
root_cause: Bluetooth polling rate too high - phone being queried every 100ms instead of 1000ms

summary: System becomes unresponsive when storage full
description: When storage reaches 100% full system becomes completely unresponsive and crashes.
root_cause: No free space handling - applications crashing when write operations fail

summary: Application deadlock when accessing shared resource
description: Two applications simultaneously accessing causes deadlock. System unresponsive.
root_cause: Incorrect mutex locking order causing circular wait condition.

summary: System fails to boot after sudden power loss
description: If power is cut during operation next boot attempt fails. System stuck at splash screen.
root_cause: Filesystem corruption due to improper shutdown - boot fails when mounting corrupted partition

summary: Fastboot mode not accessible
description: Cannot enter fastboot/download mode using button combination. Only normal boot works.
root_cause: Bootloader fastboot support disabled in production build configuration

summary: Memory leak in climate control service
description: Climate control background service memory usage grows 10MB per hour of operation.
root_cause: Climate sensor polling thread allocating buffers on each read without deallocation

summary: Memory allocation failure in low memory scenario
description: Critical allocations fail when memory low causing instability.
root_cause: No memory reservation for critical operations.

summary: Kernel panic during boot sequence
description: System crashes during boot with kernel panic error. Boot process never completes.
root_cause: Driver initialization failure - faulty kernel module crashing during probe

summary: USB autoplay during boot delays startup
description: If USB drive connected during boot system takes 20 seconds longer to reach home screen.
root_cause: USB device enumeration and media scanning running synchronously in boot path

summary: Audio voice recognition accuracy poor
description: Voice commands for audio control often misunderstood or not recognized.
root_cause: Acoustic echo cancellation not properly removing speaker audio from microphone input

summary: Bluetooth audio quality poor and choppy
description: Music streaming over Bluetooth A2DP has poor quality with frequent interruptions and dropouts.
root_cause: Bluetooth packet buffer too small causing packet loss under weak signal conditions

summary: Resource exhaustion when many apps open
description: System becomes unstable when user opens more than 15 applications. Apps fail to launch.
root_cause: Process limit reached - insufficient file descriptor pool for new processes

summary: Boot partition A/B switching logic broken
description: Dual boot partition fallback not working. Failed boot doesn't switch to backup partition.
root_cause: Boot partition selection logic not checking boot success flag before commit

summary: Resource leak in audio stream management
description: Audio stream handles not released after playback stops.
root_cause: Audio stream cleanup callback not being invoked.

summary: No sound after switching from FM to BT
description: After switching audio source from FM Radio to Bluetooth the system shows playing state but no audio output. Requires system reboot to fix.
root_cause: Audio routing misconfiguration - source switch not properly releasing FM audio path before BT connection

summary: Bluetooth range very limited
description: Bluetooth connection only works when phone is within 1-2 meters of head unit. Normal range should be 10m.
root_cause: Bluetooth transmit power set too low - antenna gain misconfiguration

summary: Crash when opening settings menu repeatedly
description: Opening and closing settings menu 10+ times in quick succession causes system crash.
root_cause: Memory fragmentation causing allocation failure when recreating settings view

summary: Crackling noise in speaker during phone calls
description: Distorted audio and crackling sound in speakers during hands-free phone calls. More noticeable at higher volumes.
root_cause: Audio DSP filter settings incorrect for HFP profile causing signal distortion

summary: Display corruption after long running session
description: After 5+ hours of operation display shows corrupted graphics artifacts and distorted UI elements.
root_cause: GPU memory leak in compositor - frame buffers accumulating without cleanup

summary: System performance degradation over weeks
description: System becomes slower over weeks of continuous operation even after reboots.
root_cause: Storage partition fragmentation or accumulated cache data impacting performance

summary: Secondary processor boot synchronization fails
description: Main SoC boots but secondary processor fails to synchronize causing partial functionality.
root_cause: Inter-processor communication not established during boot - initialization sequence race condition

summary: tmpfs filesystem growing unbounded
description: Temporary filesystem (/tmp) consuming increasing storage eventually filling partition.
root_cause: Temporary files not being cleaned up - missing cron job for tmp directory maintenance

summary: Memory leak in graphics texture cache
description: GPU texture memory grows continuously. After 8 hours GPU memory exhausted.
root_cause: Texture cache eviction policy not working.

summary: System datetime resets on every boot
description: After each boot system date and time reset to factory default 2020-01-01. RTC not working.
root_cause: Real-time clock battery dead or RTC driver not reading hardware clock at boot

summary: Zombie processes accumulating over time
description: Process table shows increasing number of zombie processes over days of operation.
root_cause: Parent processes not calling wait() to reap terminated child processes

summary: Audio sync issue between video and audio
description: When playing video files audio is out of sync lagging approximately 200ms behind video.
root_cause: Audio/video timestamp synchronization not accounting for audio processing latency

summary: Kernel memory leak in network stack
description: Kernel memory increases during network activity. Kernel OOM after extended use.
root_cause: Socket buffers not freed after connection close.

summary: Crash when memory allocation fails
description: Application crashes with segfault when malloc returns NULL.
root_cause: Missing null check after memory allocation.

summary: Memory usage keeps increasing over time
description: System memory consumption continuously increases even with no active applications running.
root_cause: Background services not releasing memory after completing tasks

summary: Services fail to start after boot
description: Boot completes but several services fail to start. Home screen loads but features missing.
root_cause: Service dependency chain broken - required services not starting in correct order

summary: Boot process missing audio chime
description: System boot audio chime doesn't play on startup. All other audio functions work normally after boot.
root_cause: Audio service initialized after boot complete event - chime trigger missed

summary: Bluetooth device firmware update fails
description: Attempting to update Bluetooth module firmware fails leaving module inoperable.
root_cause: Firmware update process not verifying image before flashing causing brick

summary: Balance control doesn't work correctly
description: Adjusting left/right balance control has no effect on audio output distribution.
root_cause: Balance gain multiplier not applied to audio mixer output channels

summary: Bluetooth device list shows duplicates
description: Same phone appears multiple times in paired device list with different addresses.
root_cause: Bluetooth database not deduplicating devices with multiple MAC addresses (random addressing)

summary: Audio noise gate causing cutoff
description: Soft audio passages get cut off completely by aggressive noise gate.
root_cause: Noise gate threshold set too high cutting legitimate quiet audio content
